transcript.text: ...of objects moving, 50-mile opaque objects, great white domes, long bridge-like structures, and so on and so forth.
So there's a net credible information from astronomical observations prior to our space program
That have led more than a number of people to suggest that there is activity on the moon.
And you, of course, believe we, of course, went to the moon, right?
Well, of course, absolutely. I believe that argument, I've heard the opposite side of that argument as well.
And when you look at the pictures that have come back, obviously, first of all, we know we've gone on to orbit around the Earth,
And we know that we went with the lunar module and with the support craft to the moon and orbited
Because we have taken such clear shots of Earth's rise coming over the lunar surface.
...and also doing the Apollo 11 and 12 programs...
Damn, I think that's all I can do right now.
...we're able to focus on the sea of tranquility...
